title: eranthemum pulchellum var. varians
intro: Eranthemum pulchellum var. varians, also known as the 'Purple Coral Flower' or 'Purple Coralbell', is a flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eranthemum pulchellum var. varians include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
